Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Divine Treasure]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Kiro's armor is a Divine Treasure kept in his soul.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Dreadgod corpses could be crafted into powerful Divine Treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — A Divine Treasure was crafted by Soulsmiths from the cores and blood essences of a hundred Lord-level Remnants.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin's Divine Treasure is inside her spirit and projects a dark crown with a crack down the center.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Eight-Man Empire uses a network of Divine Treasures to link its members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer has a disc-shaped Divine Treasure in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer possesses two Divine Treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow recognizes the power of the Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Divine Treasures are custom pieces crafted by the finest artisans of the eight factions to improve combat ability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon tossed the Divine Treasure into his void key.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Modifying a Divine Treasure is more difficult than removing a Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy has a Divine Treasure in her spirit.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon's Divine Treasure resembles a silver moon orbited by rings of intricate silver script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel's Grand Oath Array is forged by his Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Calling Storms' reconstruction is a Divine Treasure gifted by the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel can operate his Divine Treasure to some degree even without madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
